# Curated base-coverage test set for the transformers uplift pipeline.
#
# All 33 picks below are currently active. To narrow to a single test
# for fast loop validation, prefix unwanted lines with `# ` and the
# orchestrator's matrix generator will skip them.
#
# Hard filters (applied this revision):
#   - torch only (no JAX entries)
#   - EXPECTED_PASSING on BOTH n150 AND p150
#   - prefer ModelGroup.RED (nightly) — these are the highest-signal
#     models. Categories with NO RED candidates keep their previous
#     non-RED picks, and LLM gets +1 to compensate.
#
# Selection criteria (within RED pool):
#   1. Architectural diversity within each category
#   2. Popularity / blast radius
#   3. Recently churning families in transformers releases
#   4. single_device + inference variants only
#
# Breakdown (33 tests total)
#   LLM                     7  6 RED + 1 non-RED — falcon, gemma, qwen_2_5, qwen_3, phi3, phi2, mistral
#                              (mistral kept as an explicit exception — SWA + GQA architecture)
#   Encoder                 5  non-RED (no RED candidates) — bert, albert, roberta, distilbert, bart
#   Vision-CNN              5  RED — resnet, efficientnet, swin, dinov2, mobilenetv2
#   Vision-Detection        5  RED — detr, yolov4, yolov7, yolos_small, yolop
#   Vision-Segmentation     2  RED — segformer, maskformer_swin_b
#   Multimodal              4  RED — clip, siglip, vit, owl_vit
#   Audio                   2  non-RED (no RED candidates) — musicgen_small, vocoder_speecht5
#   Embedding               2  non-RED (no RED candidates) — sentencizer, bge_1_5
#   Diffusion               1  non-RED (no RED candidates) — stable_diffusion_unet

# --- LLM (RED) ---
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[falcon/pytorch-3_1B_Base-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[gemma/pytorch-1.1_2B_IT-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[qwen_2_5/causal_lm/pytorch-0.5B_Instruct-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[qwen_3/causal_lm/pytorch-0_6B-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[phi3/causal_lm/pytorch-Mini_128K_Instruct-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[phi2/causal_lm/pytorch-Phi_2-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[mistral/pytorch-Ministral_3B_Instruct-single_device-inference]

# --- Encoder (non-RED, kept from prior revision) ---

tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[roberta/masked_lm/pytorch-Xlm_Base-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[distilbert/masked_lm/pytorch-Base_Cased-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[bart/pytorch-Large-single_device-inference]

# --- Vision-CNN (RED) ---

# --- Vision-Segmentation (RED) ---

# --- Audio (non-RED, kept from prior revision) ---

# --- Embedding (non-RED, kept from prior revision) ---

# --- Diffusion (non-RED, kept from prior revision) ---
